evidence: The 2022 film Bunker is a World War I horror film involving a group of soldiers in a bunker; it is not accurately characterized as a lone-soldier story.
NHS England announced routine childhood chickenpox vaccination beginning in January 2026. The routine MMRV schedule includes doses at 12 and 18 months for eligible children.

Russian and Ukrainian are distinct East Slavic languages. Both use the word \u043c\u043e\u043b\u043e\u043a\u043e for milk; Russian unstressed o undergoes vowel reduction, while Ukrainian pronunciation retains o more clearly.

The UAE HOPE service lists 800-HOPE (8004673) as a mental support line for UAE citizens and residents. The cited official page does not establish the extra claims about a National Suicide Prevention Helpline, its operator, or 24/7 availability.
